backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a project estimation system with CRUD operations for project types (website, mobile app, AI, ecommerce, automation) and cost calculations, storing projects and estimates in maps with validation and sorting capabilities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting mobile responsiveness improvements across all frontend components (Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesSection, PricingSection, ProductShowcase, ProjectCalculator) with high confidence test mappings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend React components detailing mobile-first responsive design patterns, touch-friendly interactions (44px+ targets), performance optimizations, and Tailwind v3 compatibility updates.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes for UI elements including sidebar, charts, and semantic tokens using oklch color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag for responsive design, mounting React app to root div and loading main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component orchestrating all page sections with mobile detection for performance hints, animated backgrounds, particle effects, and smooth scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/AboutFounder.tsx: Founder profile section with responsive grid layout that stacks vertically on mobile and side-by-side on desktop, featuring image, bio, and blockquote with scroll animation effects.
frontend/src/components/AISphereTHREE.ts: Three.js 3D animated sphere component with mobile performance optimizations including reduced particle count (500 vs 1000), lower geometry detail (32 vs 64 segments), and power-efficient rendering settings.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedBackgrou: Renders a fixed animated grid background using canvas with mobile-responsive FPS throttling and a static background image overlay.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedConnecti: Draws animated connection lines and pulsing nodes on a canvas overlay with mobile-optimized grid complexity and frame rate.
frontend/src/components/BrandMessage.tsx: Displays a glass-panel styled brand message highlighting AI engineering and digital transformation services.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Provides a contact form with validation and contact information cards (email, phone, location) using scroll animations and responsive layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a footer with company branding, quick navigation links, social media icons, and copyright information with app identifier.
frontend/src/components/GlobalVision.tsx: Showcases company vision with animated icons, statistics cards (projects, clients, support), and a gradient glass-panel design.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with brand messaging, CTA buttons (consultation, WhatsApp), and a 3D AI sphere component in a responsive two-column layout.
frontend/src/components/MockupCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying project mockup images with lazy loading, hover effects, and scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation header with responsive mobile menu, scroll detection for styling changes, and smooth scrolling to page sections. Includes logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and a 'Get Started' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ParticleField.ts: Canvas-based animated particle field background with moving particles and connecting lines. Optimizes performance for mobile devices by reducing particle count, connection distance, and frame rate.
frontend/src/components/PricingCard.tsx: Reusable pricing tier card component displaying plan name, price, feature list with checkmarks, and a 'Get Started' button. Supports a 'popular' variant with special styling and badge.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Pricing section displaying four pricing tiers (Starter, Business Pro, AI Powered, Mobile App) in a responsive grid layout. Uses scroll animations and renders PricingCard components with staggered delays.
Product showcase section displaying a grid of five mockup images (trading dashboard, chatbot, SaaS panel, mobile app, automation flow) using MockupCard components with scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCalculato: Interactive project cost calculator with checkboxes for five feature options (website, mobile app, AI integration, e-commerce, automation). Calculates and displays project estimates using a custom hook.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Reusable service card component with icon, title, and description. Features hover effects, gradient icon background, and scroll-triggered fade-in animation with configurable delay.
Services section displaying six service offerings (AI website, Android/iOS apps, SaaS, automation, e-commerce) in a responsive grid using ServiceCard components with staggered animations.
Displays a grid of AI technology stack items (Machine Learning, OpenAI, ChatGPT, etc.) with animated connections, scroll-triggered visibility, and glassmorphism styling.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with a specific phone number when clicked.
frontend/src/components/WhyYadavTech.tsx: Section component showcasing six key benefits (AI-First Architecture, free support, etc.) in a responsive grid with checkmark icons and scroll animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, handling authentication state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjectEstimate.ts: Hook that calls the backend actor to calculate project cost estimates based on selected features (website, mobile app, etc.) with loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all project types and estimates from the backend actor, enabled only when actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when an element enters the viewport and trigger visibility state for scroll animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for dark theme colors (space-black, neon-blue, electric-purple), glassmorphism utilities, gradient text, glow effects, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH colors, glow box shadows, border radius variables, and keyframe animations for accordion, float, and fade effects.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting 11 existing features focused on responsive design optimization for mobile and desktop across various website components including navigation, hero section, services, pricing, forms, and canvas animations.
